summary: Iteration 21 — Studio de marque (Étape 5) full regression PASS. All 7 backend tests pass (GET /design, GET /navigation, POST /design/seed-legal, POST /design/ai-field, POST /navigation/ai-optimize, POST /collections/ai-suggest + invalid field guard). Frontend build compiles cleanly, login works, /sites/{id}/design renders 4 tabs; all AI testids (ai-name/tagline/voice/story/palette/fonts, ai-nav-optimize, ai-collections-suggest) and regen-{hero,about,benefits,faq,testimonials,contact} buttons present. New seed-legal button clicks correctly and returns 200. ai-tagline click triggers POST /design/ai-field (returned 200 in ~2s during standalone curl test — 'Se relever en douceur, rester soi avec élégance'). No regression on GET /sites/{id}/design (returns {design, site_id, site_name}). BrandingContent.jsx unterminated-string syntax bug from previous fork is confirmed fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/design.py has duplicate _slugify definitions at lines 208 and 1126 — the second overrides the first. Both produce equivalent output but this is a DRY violation; remove the first or unify.

routes/design.py is ~1213 lines — well over the 700-line guideline. Split into design_core.py (generate/regenerate/publish), design_studio.py (prompt runner, palette, ai-field), navigation.py and collections.py to improve maintainability.

POST /sites/{id}/design/publish still uses `publish: bool = True` as a Query param (unchanged since iter20). Frontend togglePublish sends no body, so server can only PUBLISH, not un-publish. Move to a Pydantic body.
ai_field endpoint stores JSON palette as both `design.brand.{k}_color` AND `design.brand.palette.{k}` — two sources of truth. Collapse to a single canonical path (palette.*).

Error handling in ai-nav-optimize and ai-collections-suggest swallows HTTPException from _claude_json: the inner raise becomes a generic 502 with `IA indisponible : ...` — specific 402 (budget exhausted) or 504 (timeout) codes are lost. Catch HTTPException separately and re-raise to preserve status codes.
BrandingContent.jsx: 4 uses of window.alert() for errors — replace with toast (consistency callout also in iter19/iter20).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 4 tabs render, all required AI + regen + seed-legal testids present, seed-legal returns 200, ai-field POST fires on tagline click

seed_data_creation: test_seed_legal_creates_three_pages wrote design.legal_pages (cgv, mentions_legales, confidentialite) to site 65964cb0... via the new seed-legal endpoint. ai-field tagline also mutated design.brand.tagline with a generated French value.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iteration21_studio.py is the regression suite for Étape 5 Studio de marque. Tests accept LLM endpoints returning 200/402/502/504 (not timeouts). Concepteur's only site is 65964cb0-7a1a-4c11-9644-1ad8f2371d48 ('Test Fauteuils Releveurs'). All Studio testids: tab-{identity|navigation|collections|content}, ai-{name|tagline|voice|story|palette|fonts}, ai-nav-optimize, ai-collections-suggest, regen-{hero|about|benefits|faq|testimonials|contact|logo}, seed-legal, design-generate, design-publish, design-brief, design-regen-all, brand-{name|tagline|voice|story}, logo-{upload|prompt}, save-{brand|navigation}, nav-add-{header|footer}. Ingress timeout is still ~60s but ai-field calls return in <5s (tagline: ~2s).
rca of the issue: N/A — no new bugs found. Prior fork's BrandingContent.jsx unterminated string (line 206) is confirmed fixed; new seed-legal button wiring is functional end-to-end.
